# Release Safety Checklist

## Deployment Plan Must Answer
- how the change rolls out
- who owns the rollout
- how success is verified during deployment
- what signals indicate pause or stop

## Rollback Plan Must Answer
- what triggers rollback
- exact rollback steps
- data or state implications
- how to verify recovery

## Release Verification Must Cover
- pre-release checks
- release-time checks
- post-release checks
- feature flag or rollout checks when relevant
